3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! It's great to be part of this organization and work with such passionate people. We're like a family - always supporting each other. Do anything fun lately?
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 Maria: Yeah, last weekend I had a picnic with some friends from church. We chilled under the trees, played games, and ate yummy food. It was great!
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Looks fun! What games did you all play?
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 Maria: Some fun ones like charades and a scavenger hunt. We all had a good laugh!
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Sounds like a blast! It's always great to have fun and bring out everyone's creative and silly sides with games like that. Laughter and joy are really important! I'm thinking of setting up something like this for my kids soon.

3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: There were arts and crafts at a community event last month. There were fun activities and games for families and everyone was having a blast. So I figured I'd try them out with my family and friends.
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 Maria: Wow, great idea! Connecting with others and discovering fun activities is always awesome. It's really cool how you adapted it for your family and friends!
3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! I couldn't agree more. Life's too short, let's have some fun!

3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Yep, Maria! That's why it's important to keep spreading positivity and making a difference.

3:34 pm on 17 July, 2023 John: Yep, Maria! Those things really matter. Little acts of kindness can really brighten someone's day. Let's keep spreading the love and making a difference.

Session window: 6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 -> 6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 John: Hi Maria! It's so good to talk again. A lot has changed since last time. I'm really enjoying my new job. My team has been super encouraging and inspiring.
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 Maria: Hey John, glad work is going well! Having a good team is so important. I had a great experience last weekend hiking with my church  friends - it was great to be surrounded by supportive people and to enjoy nature. Felt so refreshing!
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 John: Sounds like you had a great time! What inspired you to go on the hike?
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 Maria: I wanted to make connections, laugh together and take in nature's beauty. Uplifting!
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 John: Wow Maria, it sounds like you had a great time! Connecting with good people and taking in the beautiful views really boosts your mood. It's important to make time for yourself and find those special moments of joy. What were some of your best bits from the hike?
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 Maria: Thanks, John! Reaching the top was amazing - the view was breathtaking! Seeing how huge the world is made me feel like I'm part of something special - gave me a real sense of peace.
6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 John: Wow, Maria, that sounds incredible! It's amazing how nature can make us feel so small and yet so connected to something greater. Do you have any plans for your next adventure yet?

6:21 pm on 22 July, 2023 John: Yup, it's a yoga studio I go to often. The vibe is really chill and the instructors are awesome.

features.content_text:
Session window: 1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 -> 1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Hey John, I'm doing ok - hope you are too. Some interesting stuff has been going on; last week I dropped off that stuff I baked at the homeless shelter. It was great and I'm more motivated than ever to help people.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Hey Maria, that's awesome! I'm really inspired by your drive to make a difference. You mentioned your work at the homeless shelter last time and it made me think of how I could help too, so I just joined a fire-fighting brigade. It's such a great feeling to do something to give back to my community!
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Wow John, joining the fire brigade? That's great! How's it been so far?
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! It's been tough, but really rewarding. The training was intense and taxing, but it changed my view on helping others. Last Sunday we had our first call-out, and it was intense. We responded to a situation and our team worked together to help those in need. Seeing their relief was awesome.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Wow, John! What was it like being part of that rescue mission?
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: It was chaotic when we arrived, but we pulled together. I got a surge of energy and purpose, and we were able to save a family from a burning building. It was wild, but knowing we made a difference made it worth it.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Wow John, that's intense! Helping out like that takes guts - it's inspiring to hear about the difference you made.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! It was an adrenaline rush, and I couldn't have done it without them. We trust and rely on one another, and it's great to know that we have each other's backs. They've become like family to me.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Sounds great, John! It must feel incredible to have a supportive team like that.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Yeah, it really does feel helpful, Maria. We have different skills and talents, but they all contribute to serving and protecting our community. And it's a bond I haven't felt since my time in the military.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Glad you've found that same strong bond. Having friends you can rely on makes a huge difference.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Yeah, Maria! It's nice to know we're all in this together, striving to keep our community safe. I find it fulfilling and meaningful.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Yeah John! It feels great to help people, and you're so awesome for it! Here's a shot I got when I volunteered. Reminds me being kind matters!
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: That's a cool photo, Maria! Small acts like that can really make a difference. Keep it up!
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Thanks, John! I totally agree, so I'm gonna keep it up.
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 John: Way to go, Maria! Keep on being positive and making a difference. You're doing great!
1:59 pm on 31 July, 2023 Maria: Thanks John! Your support means a lot to me. I'll definitely keep on going. Talk to you soon!

6:20 pm on 3 August, 2023 Maria: Thanks John. That really means a lot. It's been tough but knowing I can make a difference keeps me motivated.

Session window: 5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 -> 5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Hey Maria, great chatting with you again! Crazy thing happened since we last talked. I lost my job at the mechanical engineering company. They tanked and it's been really rough. Never saw this coming.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Sorry to hear about your job, John. I can only imagine how tough it must be. How are you holding up?
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Thanks for your care, Maria. It's been tough but I'm trying to stay up. I've been looking into some opportunities in the tech industry for a while now. Maybe this is the change I need, you gave me the push!
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John, glad you're looking into other avenues. Any promising leads come up?
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Thanks Maria! I may have found a job at a tech company I like that needs my mechanical skills for their hardware team. It feels different, but I think it's a great opportunity to learn and contribute.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John, that sounds like the perfect job for you! You're so adaptable, I'm sure you'll do great. Good luck!
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! I appreciate your support, it really means a lot.

5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John, I'm here for you! Staying positive makes a big difference, even in tough times. Yesterday, I took up some community work with my friends from church. It was super rewarding!
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Wow, Maria! That's great. Glad it was rewarding for you.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Thanks, John! These moments remind me of how important kindness and compassion are. Have you had any volunteer experiences you'd like to share?
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: I haven't been able to volunteer much lately, but I definitely care about it. Last year, I helped renovate a rundown community center back home. It took a lot of work, but seeing the impact on the community was so worth it.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: John, that's great! Must be really satisfying to witness the positive effect it's having on your hometown.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Yeah! It was really cool to see everyone come together and help out - it's been amazing to see it so busy!
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John, awesome job! Keep doing what you're doing - you're making a real difference!
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: It's really encouraging to hear that. I'll keep pushing forward and doing my best.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: You got this! You're inspiring and keep making a difference.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: I appreciate it! Your words are really motivating.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 Maria: No worries, John. I'm here to support you. If there's anything else I can do, just let me know.
5:19 pm on 5 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria. Your support means a lot to me. If I need anything, I'll be sure to reach out.

features.content_text:
Session window: 8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 -> 8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John, what's been going on? I just wanted to check in. Last week was wild - I volunteered at the homeless shelter and they gave me a medal! It was humbling and I'm really glad I could help.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Hey Maria! Congrats on the recognition! It's really touching to see how much you're doing to help out. Last weekend, I participated in a community event to raise money for a good cause. We got a great turnout and it was amazing to be surrounded by so many supportive people.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: John, that sounds inspiring! Community events like that are always amazing. This pic is heartwarming, that little girl has such a cute smile. What was the event all about?
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: I set up a 5K charity run in our neighborhood. It was all for a good cause - to help out veterans and their families. We were able to raise some funds! Here's a pic from the day.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: John, that's awesome! That is such an important cause. It's an honor to know someone like you who takes initiative. The photo you shared is so powerful! Could you tell me more about how you organized the run?
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! It means a lot to me. It was hard work - getting sponsors, coordinating with the city, and spreading the word. But seeing everyone come together to support our veterans made it worth it.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John, that sounds like a lot of effort! Your dedication definitely paid off. Were there any challenges along the way?
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Definitely, Maria! Getting sponsors was difficult. I had to reach out to several businesses through different means, but it paid off. We ended up with some awesome sponsors that made the event a hit.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John! You really overcame those challenges. Have you done events for any other causes?
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Yep, we worked with a local organization that helps victims of domestic abuse. We raised awareness and funds at the event for the cause — it's unfortunate how many people suffer from it.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Oof, John, that's really sad. Domestic abuse is horrible. You did great raising awareness and funds. It's important we support the organizations fighting against it.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria. It's a tough issue, but we've gotta do what we can. It's really wonderful to see people come together for such an important cause.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Agree, John! It's great to see community power in action. Let's keep spreading awareness and supporting causes like this.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Yeah Maria! I totally agree! Together, we can do so much. Let's keep spreading the good vibes and making our community better.
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: You rock! Let's keep spreading positivity and making a difference. We got this!
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Yeah, we got this. Thanks for your help!
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, John! It's really cool to have a friend like you who's just as passionate and motivated. Let's talk again soon!
8:06 pm on 9 August, 2023 John: Yeah Maria! Friends like you make a big difference. Talk to you later!

features.content_text:
Session window: 12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 -> 12:10 am on 11 August, 2023
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John! Long time no talk! Guess what - I got a puppy two weeks ago! Her name's Coco and she's adorable.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Wow, Maria! Coco looks so adorable! She seems so happy in that photo. How's it been having her around?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Thanks, John! It really brings joy to my life; she's always there to greet me when I come home. It's definitely been an adjustment taking care of her, but it's totally worth it!
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: That's great! Pets are the best for lifting our spirits. I'm always still thinking about Max- here's a pic of him.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Aww, he looks so cute in that pic! He obviously brought you lots of joy. What's your best memory with him?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! Max and I had a blast on our camping trip last summer. We hiked, swam, and made great memories. It was a really peaceful and awesome experience.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John, sounds like you and Max had a great time! Camping with pets can be so soul-nourishing, right?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Definitely, Maria! It was so chill. Being out in nature, away from all the noise and taking some quality time was great. It was a nice break from the everyday hustle and bustle.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John! Sounds awesome! I can imagine that it felt good to tune out and get lost in nature!
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Yeah, it was like restarting my mind and spirit. It's amazing how peaceful and pretty it can be. It made me remember the little things in life and savor the peaceful moments.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, nature is amazing like that. It's like a reset for our souls and your photos capture it.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! I'm glad my photos can capture that feeling. They help me take a step back and appreciate the little things in life - especially these days. There've been some tough times lately for me.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Sorry to hear that, John. Is there anything on your mind lately?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Lately, I've been stumped about something. Don't feel like I'm making much of an impact here, which has me questioning my decisions and goals.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John, I understand how you feel. It's tough when you start questioning that. But remember, even small things can make a difference. Why do you feel that way?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Thanks for understanding. I just want to positively affect people and the world, but it feels like I'm stuck. I need to find a better way to focus my passion and enthusiasm.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, it can be tough. Taking small steps can help. Have you thought about any ideas for how to channel your energy into something meaningful?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Lately I've been exploring options. One idea I had was to join local organizations or volunteering programs. Maybe that's an option.
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Sounds like a great plan, John! That could definitely help you make a difference. You can meet like-minded people and contribute to causes that you care about. Why not do some research and explore the organizations you'd be interested in?
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Yeah, Maria, that's a good idea. I'll make a list of the ones that suit what I believe in and reach out for more info. Thanks!
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: No worries, John. I'm happy to help. Let me know if you need anything else. Keep going, you can do it!
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 John: Thanks for your kind words, Maria! I'll let you know if I need anything else. Keep being positive and kind, you're an inspiration!
12:10 am on 11 August, 2023 Maria: Thanks, John. Your words mean a lot. I'll definitely keep spreading positivity. Take care!

Session window: 3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 -> 3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Hi Maria, since we last chatted, I'm volunteering as a mentor for a local school. It's really rewarding to see how much I can help these students.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John! You're doing great things. Kudos for helping kids learn. On another note, I just adopted this cute pup from a shelter last week. She brings so much joy! I feel blessed to be able to give her a home.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Wow, Maria, how cute! What's her name? Do she and your other dog get along?
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Her name is Shadow! She's full of energy and always puts a smile on my face. She's been a great addition to my life. They get along great.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Aww, that sounds adorable! Animals really bring a lot of joy and love, don't they? Did you have any pets growing up?
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: No, I didn't. But having a furry pal definitely brightens my days.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: They sure do!  I'll have to look into shelters near me soon, it would be great to have a new pup in the house.

3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, John! Pets are great at making you feel loved. It's awesome having them around, they bring so much joy! How's everything going with the mentoring program? Are the students making progress?
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: They're doing great - there's been a real improvement in their confidence and skills. It was so amazing to see one of them last week, so excited to show me their essay. It was a proud moment! How's your new pup doing, Maria?
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Awesome, John! Sounds like it's really making a difference. The little one is doing great - learning commands and house training.

3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: She's an amazing learner - so much fun to work with and watch her grow. She's brought me so much joy!

3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Animals are amazing— They can be incredible companions.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, they can really comfort us and make us feel understood in ways others can't. It's amazing how they bring us so much happiness.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Yeah, animals bring us peace and understanding, plus we can always count on them. That's so priceless.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Absolutely, John. They're always there for us.

3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Yeah, my family is awesome - me, the missus, and the kids. Even when times are hard, they always have my back. Best thing ever, really.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: That picture is so cute! What activities do you all enjoy doing together?
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! We love being outdoors - going for hikes, hanging out at the park, having picnics - plus playing board games and having movie nights at home.
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Sounds like a blast, John! Spending time with family is so important, and that all sounds perfect. Have a great time!
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! I'm off to spend some time with them now. Have a good day!
3:14 pm on 13 August, 2023 Maria: Enjoy your family time, John! Have a great day!

features.content_text:
Session window: 11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 -> 11:08 am on 16 August, 2023
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Hey Maria! Guess what? I'm now part of the fire-fighting brigade. I'm super excited to be involved and help out my community!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Wow John, that's impressive! You're really enthusiastic about making a change. How's your experience been so far?
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: I was impressed with their dedication and how well they worked together. Just being around them was so inspiring!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: That's amazing. Must have been awesome to see all those people working together.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: It definitely was! Everyone was so into it. It's amazing how a group can succeed at something so important. It only took us two hours. We worked hard but did something good – it was really satisfying.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Wow, John! It looks like everyone was working hard. Did you raise any donations?
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Yup, we raised a ton! We got stuff like canned food, toiletries, and clothes to help out. Feels great to be part of it!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: I bet! It's great to see the community coming together to support the local fire station.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: You're right, Maria. It's great to help out and see everyone coming together for this cause. It gives me a sense of purpose and passion. I feel like this is my true calling.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Awesome, John! Loving your newfound passion. You're doing great things - keep it up! It's wonderful to see everyone coming together for this cause.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Thanks, Maria! Your support means a lot to me. It's amazing how finding my passion has made such a big impact. I'll keep working hard on it. The donations even helped get a brand new fire truck!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Look at that - we all donated for it, and it looks awesome!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Thanks for being a part of this with me, Maria. I appreciate your support.

11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Hey John, I'm here for you. Last Friday, I spent some time at the shelter volunteering at the front desk. Seeing the smiles on their faces when they got food or a bed really made me feel good. We have the power to make a difference in people's lives.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Maria, I'm glad you're finding fulfillment there. It's amazing how a little kindness can have such a big impact on someone's life. Let's continue making a difference in our community!
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 Maria: Yeah, John! Let's keep spreading kindness. It's awesome to know we can bring joy and comfort to those who need it.
11:08 am on 16 August, 2023 John: Yeah, Maria, let's keep each other and everyone else motivated to make a difference! Together, our impact will surely last.

7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022 Joanna: No problem, Nate! Let me know if you like it!

2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Nate: Hi Joanna! Long time no see! What's been going on? You sound excited!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Joanna: Woo! I finally finished my first full screenplay and printed it last Friday. I've been working on for a while, such a relief to have it all done!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Nate: Wow, that sounds awesome! What's it about? Glad it's all down!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! It's a mix of drama and romance!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Nate: Wow, that's amazing! How do you feel now that it's finished? Do you have any new plans for it?
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Joanna: Woohoo, Nate! I'm feeling a rollercoaster of emotions - relief, excitement, some anxiety - over finishing this project. Now I'm gonna submit it to some film festivals and (hopefully) get producers and directors to check it out. Here's hoping!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Nate: Congrats, Joanna! That sounds like a wild experience. Rock on and I hope they love it!

2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Joanna: Writing and hanging with friends! That way I can express myself through stories, or just have a good time with people.

2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Nate: Wow, Joanna, that sounds amazing! Keep doing what you love!
2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! I'll definitely keep pursuing my passion for writing. It means a lot.

1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Joanna: Yeah Nate, your cooking is amazing! I can't stop thinking about the screenplay, so I just started writing another one while I wait to hear back about how the first one did.
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Nate: I hear that, taking your mind of something like that is very challenging. What's the new one about?
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Joanna: It's about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss. Somewhat similar to the last one, but hey, that's just the kind of thing I'm inspired to write about!
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Nate: Interesting! That's a deep topic. Love to hear more about it.
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! It's my own story. The main character is dealing with some tough stuff: loss and trying to figure out who they are. They take a road trip to heal and grow.
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Nate: Wow, Joanna, that sounds awesome. I love stories that tackle important issues. What inspired you to this one?
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! It was inspired by personal experiences and my own journey of self-discovery.
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Nate: Wow, Joanna, that takes guts! I can't wait to see it all come together. I'm also pumped to see how your first one will do!
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate your support. Hoping my screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen. Fingers crossed!
1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022 Nate: Crossing my fingers for you! Hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due. Good luck!

features.content_text:
Session window: 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 -> 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen.
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt.
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Nate: It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Joanna: That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Nate: I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Joanna: They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Nate: No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun.
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Joanna: Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience.
6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022 Nate: Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill.
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's experience with her second script and Nate's pet turtles script, anxiety, pets, turtles, decompression, joy, calm

features.content_text:
Session window: 3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 -> 3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you! Quite a week since we last talked - something awesome happened to me!
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Hey Jo! Great hearing from you! What happened?
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: I went hiking and found some more amazing trails in my town. It was such an awesome experience! I think I am an expert hiker now.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Sounds great, Jo! Happy you had an awesome experience. Did you happen to take any photos of it?
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Yeah, I did! Loved this spot on the hike. The rush of the water was so soothing.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Wow, looks great! Where did you take this picture? I love the dark sky and green scenery.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Thanks! I took this photo at a beautiful location called Whispering Falls. It was really peaceful and serene.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: I wish I could have been there! Your hikes sound like a blast.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: It was awesome, Nate. The sound of that place and the beauty of nature made me so calm and peaceful. Everything else faded away and all that mattered was the present.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: That's great. Glad you found a spot that calms you down - nature sure can be a break from the craziness.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Nature totally inspires me and it's so calming to be surrounded by its beauty. Hiking has opened up a whole new world for me and I feel like a different person now.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Wow, Jo, that's really cool! It's great to have something that gets those creative juices flowing.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: I always feel like I could write a whole movie when I'm out there in cool places like that!
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's hiking experience and its impact hiking, trails, Whispering Falls, nature, experience, photos, creativity

events.description: I went hiking and found some more amazing trails in my town.
I took this photo at a beautiful location called Whispering Falls.

features.content_text:
Session window: 3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 -> 3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Wow! That's really cool that it inspires you that much! For me I just get deep in thought and think about my life or new recipes.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: I think about my life too sometimes when I'm out and about, but there was something special about these trails that made me feel like writing a drama.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Hey, we should go together sometime, don't you think? Maybe I'll start to think of a drama myself and publish my own screenplay.
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Haha, now that would be something! Sure, you should come down and join me on the trails sometime!
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: Sounds like a plan! Thanks for the invite Joanna!
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Joanna: Sure thing Nate! See you later!
3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022 Nate: See ya!

features.content_text:
Session window: 7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 -> 7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! How've you been? Been a busy week since we talked.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Just finished something - pretty wild journey!
features.topic_kw_text: catching up after a busy week Nate, Joanna, busy week, journey

events.description: Nate has had a busy week since they last talked.

features.content_text:
Session window: 7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 -> 7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Way to go! I just got a new addition to the family, this is Max!
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Wow, he's adorable! How long have you had him? I can see why you're thrilled!
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Thanks! It's awesome - he's adopted and so full of energy, and he's filling my life with so much joy. He's even keeping my other pets active.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Pets sure do make life better! Glad Max is bringing you lots of joy.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Yep, totally! Pets make us so much happier and never let us down. Have you thought any more of getting one of your own?
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Unfortunately, allergies make it so I don't really want to get any, and I'm too lazy to research alternative pets for my allergies.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Aww, that's unfortunate. It's nice seeing the joy pets bring to others, though. How do you find comfort when you don't have any?
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Writing and creative projects are what get me through tough times. I'm also grateful for my supportive friends.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Wow, that's awesome! Those both can definitely be therapeutic. It's great to have such positive relationships that make such a great impact.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Yeah. It's so nice to have friends who understand and appreciate my work - it's priceless being able to talk about it together and receive feedback. Here's a look at what I've been working on – it's been quite a journey, but I made it!
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Wow, that looks great Joanna! Is that your third one?
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Yep! I chose to write about this because it's really personal. It's about loss, identity, and connection. It's a story I've had for ages but just got the guts to write it. It was hard, but I'm so proud of it.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: That sounds impressive. You really do like writing about sadness and loss don't you.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Yeah I really do. I had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics. But I think meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings. It was scary, but I found that I write best when I'm being true to myself - even if it's hard.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: Well done, Joanna! It takes guts to explore your experiences and feelings. I'm proud of you for staying strong and being true to yourself. Keep it up!
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Your support really means a lot. Knowing I've got people like you cheering me on makes this journey way easier.
7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022 Nate: No worries, Joanna! Keep going and reach for your dreams. You've got tons of talent and potential!
features.topic_kw_text: Nate's new pet and Joanna's writing journey Max, pets, allergies, writing, creative projects, loss, identity, connection

events.description: Nate got a new addition to the family, this is Max.

Joanna's story is about loss, identity, and connection.

features.content_text:
Session window: 3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 -> 3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Hey Jo! Been ages since we last talked. Here's something cool that happened the other day - I took Max for a walk and ran into this super nice couple who had a dog. It turns out they live close by. We decided to do doggy playdates, which is awesome considering we all need friends for our pets.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you. Sounds like a nice encounter on your walk. Connecting with others who have pets can be uplifting and rewarding.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: It's like fate. Having a walking buddy forMax will be great. He really likes the other dog too!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Awesome! Did you get to know the couple very well? What were they like?
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: They actually didn't share a whole lot in common with me besides the love of animals, but I think that was all we needed to share in common to be good friends!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: That's really cool that you can just go out and meet people like that, keep it up Nate!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Thanks! I just really enjoy watching our pets play with one another. Its like a dream come true seeing my dog so happy.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: I can see why having a peaceful presence around could help relieve stress. Having someone or something to come home to for a sense of calm would be helpful for relaxation.
features.topic_kw_text: Nate's encounter with a couple during a dog walk dog, couple, playdates, friends, pets, encounter, relaxation

events.description: I took Max for a walk and ran into this super nice couple who had a dog.
We decided to do doggy playdates.

features.content_text:
Session window: 3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 -> 3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Yep, Joanna. It's great! Looky here, I got this new pup for you!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Awww! It's so cute! I love the thought Nate!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Thanks! It's a stuffed animal to remind you of the good vibes.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: That's so sweet! I'll cherish that little guy with all my heart!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Yeah! It's like having joy in your pocket. It always makes me grin when I look at it.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: That's great, Nate! Appreciate the small joys like that cute stuffed animal. It's a nice reminder!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Agreed, those little things sure do make life better!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: I'll always remember those moments that bring us happiness and remind us that life is great!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Sure, Joanna! It's all about finding those little things and cherishing them, otherwise it's easy to get down!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Thinking back to the tough times finishing my screenplay made me realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Yeah, those little moments make it all worth it, especially during tough times. Enjoying the ride is key.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer! It keeps us focused on our dreams. Can't wait to show it to you. I value your opinion!
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: Can't wait to see it, Joanna! I'm here to support you.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Your support is greatly appreciated. I'll make sure to keep you updated.
3:00 pm on 25 May, 2022 Nate: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up!

Session window: 5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 -> 5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Joanna: Nate, after finishing my screenplay I got a rejection letter from a major company. It really bummed me out.
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Nate: Sorry to hear that, Joanna. Rejection stinks, but it doesn't mean you're not talented. Don't give up on your dreams!
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate. It can feel like a step back sometimes. But I appreciate your kind words and encouragement.
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Nate: Sure, just make sure you keep going and believing in yourself. Did something happen with the company?
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Joanna: They just sent me a generic rejection letter without much feedback. It's disheartening not knowing why it didn't work out.
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Nate: Ugh, that's so frustrating. But don't get discouraged, just keep going.

5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Nate: I've been doing great - I just won another regional video game tournament last week! It was so cool, plus I met some new people. Connecting with fellow gamers is always awesome.
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Joanna: Way to go, Nate! Congratulations on your victory in the tournament! It must feel great to be recognized for your gaming skills.
5:44 pm on 3 June, 2022 Nate: Thanks, Joanna! Winning was a huge confidence boost and shows my hard work paid off. I'm really happy with my progress.

features.content_text:
Session window: 2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 -> 2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Yesterday was crazy cool - I wrote a few bits for a screenplay that appeared on the big screen yesterday! It was nerve-wracking but so inspiring to see my words come alive!
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Nate: Congrats, Joanna! Seeing your hard work pay off like that must've felt amazing. I bet it was scary too, but awesome! You're so inspiring. By the way, last time we saw eachother, I noticed a spiderman pin on your purse. Is Spider-Man your favorite superhero, or do you have another fave?
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! It was a real roller coaster, but seeing the hard work pay off was amazing. Spider-Man has always been a favorite of mine - I mean, who doesn't love Peter Parker's struggles between being a hero and being a person? But I'm kind of a sucker for any superhero - everyone has their own rad story and powers. Do you have a favorite superhero?
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Nate: That's great, Joanna! Iron Man is my top pick. I love his tech and that sarcastic humor. Seeing these figures just makes me feel invincible!
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Wow, Nate! That's awesome. I love the tech and funny jokes of Iron Man too. What made you get that figure?
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Nate: Thanks Joanna! I got it because it reminded me of something I love. Its presence in my room is a good reminder to keep working on my goals. Any inspiring things in your room?
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: My cork board is full of inspiring quotes and pictures for motivation and creativity. It's my little corner of inspiration.
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Nate: Wow Joanna, that sounds great! Could you show me a picture of it?
2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Here ya go, a pic of my cork board. It's got quotes, photos, and little keepsakes.

2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Having that picture on my cork board reminds me of the love and encouragement from them every day.

2:12 pm on 5 June, 2022 Joanna: Absolutely, it means a lot and keeps me going.

Session window: 10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 -> 10:55 am on 24 June, 2022
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, long time no see! How have you been? I just got done submitting my recent screenplay to a film contest just to see how others might like it!
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Nate: That's really cool Joanna! I hope it does well, and I've been doing great! The gaming party was a great success! We even played some Chess afterward just for fun.
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Joanna: Nice! Did your friends like the controller accessories?
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Nate: Most of them did! I can't say if all of them will continue to use them or not, but that's beside the point.
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Joanna: Yeah Nate, you're right. It doesn't matter if they use it, its the thought that matters right?
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Nate: Absolutely! There were 7 people that attended, and 6 of them said they'd want to do it again next month!
10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Joanna: That sounds like a huge success then! Congrats!

10:55 am on 24 June, 2022 Joanna: Mm, yum! Can you give me the recipe for that? It sounds like it'd be a good recipe!

Session window: 2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 -> 2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, check this out! I won my fourth video game tournament on Friday! It was awesome competing and showing off my skills - and the victory was indescribable. I'm really proud that I can make money doing what I love. This one was online!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Congrats, Nate! That's awesome! So proud of you. Your hard work really paid off - keep it up! BTW, I took a road trip for research for my next movie while you were winning. Much-needed break and a chance to explore new places and get inspired.
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: Thanks, Joanna! Your support means a lot to me. That road trip sounds great! Where did you go? Did you discover any interesting places?
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! Appreciate your kind words. I went to Woodhaven, a small town in the Midwest. Got to see some lovely scenery and historic buildings. Checked out the library there, it had a cool old book collection!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: That place looks interesting! Did you find any cool books there?
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: I stumbled upon this super cool book from the 1900s with stories and sketches - so awesome to read about the town and the people living there!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: That sounds really interesting! Anyting specific stick out to you about it?
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Woodhaven has had an interesting past with lots of cool people. Seeing how much it changed sparked ideas for my next script.
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: Real-life stories are the best for inspiration. Can't wait to hear about your next one. Keep it up!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! I'm stoked about this new script. It's different from my previous work, but it has the potential to be something awesome! I'll be sure to keep you posted.
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: I'm sure it will do just as well as your last one! Keep on trying and believe in yourself!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot to me. You're the best for supporting me in my writing journey.
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: I'm always here for you! You've got so much talent, just keep going for it!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: I will! I actually started on a book recently since my movie did well!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: Nice! I'm curious, what is it about?
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: That page specifically has some dialogues exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness. It's a deep and emotional story that I'm really excited about!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: Wow, Joanna! It sounds awesome. I'm so excited to see how it all plays out!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! I'm so glad you're excited. I've never really tried publishing a book, but this might be the first!

2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Your belief in me means a lot. I'll keep doing my best. Thanks for the support!
2:34 pm on 10 July, 2022 Nate: No problem, Joanna. I'm here for you. Your hard work will pay off, I promise. Believe in yourself and your talent - you're incredible!

Session window: 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 -> 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, long time no talk! I've been busy with writing projects and really going all out with it. It's been the best thing ever - a mix of highs and lows - and my journal's pretty much my rock. Writing's such a huge part of me now.
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! Great to hear it! It's amazing how much a certain activity can become a part of our lives. Keep it up, you're inspiring! Is writing your way to solace and creativity?
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Yeah, definitely. Writing has become like an escape and a way to express my feelings. It gives me a chance to put all my thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it. Words just have a magical way of healing.

features.content_text:
Session window: 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 -> 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: That's really cool, I like it! It's incredible how words can turn something sad into something special. I'm glad it worked for you. Anything cool happening recently?
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Yep. Last week, someone wrote me a letter after reading an online blog post I made about a hard moment in my life. Their words touched me; they said my story had brought them comfort. It was awesome to realize my words had that kind of power. It reminded me why I love writing.
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: Nice work, Joanna! That must feel sureal. Keep it up - you're changing lives!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Really appreciate your kind words. It's knowing that my writing can make a difference that keeps me going, even on tough days. So glad to have this outlet to share my stories and hopefully have an impact. How about you? Anything new since we last talked?
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: Thanks, Joanna! Your words mean a lot. Since we last spoke, I started teaching people how to make this. Sharing my love for dairy-free desserts has been fun and rewarding.
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Yum, Nate! I love it when you make coconut milk icecream, it's so good!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: I've been really into making this lately - it's creamy, rich, dairy-free and a new recipe! Wanna try it? I can share the recipe with you if you'd like!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: I'd love to try it! Thanks for sharing your love for dairy-free desserts. I really appreciate it!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: No problem, Joanna! Always happy to share them with you. Sending you the recipe now!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Can't wait to surprise my family with something delicious!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: No problem, Joanna! Wish them luck! Let me know how it goes. Have a blast baking!
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate. I'll keep you posted. Have a great day.
6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022 Nate: You too!

features.content_text:
Session window: 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 -> 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Woah Joanna, I won an international tournament yesterday! It was wild. Gaming has brought me so much success and now I'm able to make a living at something I'm passionate about - I'm loving it.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Congrats, Nate! So proud of you for winning that tournament, that's awesome! Must feel great to turn your passion into a career.

features.content_text:
Session window: 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 -> 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: I'm really stoked to see all my hard work paying off! I'm super proud of what I accomplished. On another note, my little dudes got a new tank! Check them out, they're so cute, right?!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Wow Nate, they're adorable! I can see why you enjoy spending time with them. It looks like they have so much more room to swim now!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: They're my little buddies, always calm and peaceful. It makes coming home after a long day of gaming better. The tank expansion has made them so happy! How have you been?

features.content_text:
Session window: 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 -> 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: I'm good! Was super nervous last week when I shared my book with my writers group but got some great feedback. My hard work is paying off, it's such an awesome feeling!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Wow Jo, you're killing it! Getting this kind of feedback means people are really connecting with your writing. Pretty cool! Did you celebrate?
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! It feels great knowing that people like my writing. I celebrated by making this delicious treat - yum! Any plans for the weekend?
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: I'm taking some time off this weekend to chill with my pets. Anything cool happening with you?
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: I'm relaxing and recharging this weekend with a long walk and some reading. It's a good break.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Looks like we both need a break. I'm glad your able to find a way to recharge! It's so incredibly important to take time off!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! I've learned that taking breaks and looking after myself are important for my inspiration and mental health. It's all about finding balance.

features.content_text:
Session window: 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 -> 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Yeah, balance is key! It's so cool how taking care of ourselves helps us be more creative and happier. I'm always looking for something new to read. Got any book recommendations? I've got a lot of books to choose from.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: I reccomend finding a fantasy book series to read through. Most fiction series are great reads when your trying to relax.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Good idea! How about this series?
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: That's a great one! Let me know what you think when your finished!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Sure thing! And since your recommending me a book, I thought I should do the same! I'd really recommend this series. It's got awesome battles and interesting characters.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Wow, that series looks awesome! I'll have to check it out sometime!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: You really should! The action scenes are awesome and the plot rocks. Definitely one of my favorites!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Wow, sounds great! I'll definitely add it to my list; thanks for the recommendation!
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Nate: Enjoy it! Have a good day.
10:57 am on 22 August, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! You too! Have a great day. Take care.

features.content_text:
Session window: 6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 -> 6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! Long time no talk. So much has happened. Look how cute they are! Hanging with them has been a big help, especially recently. Speaking of which, I just had a letdown in a video game tourney - I didn't do too great, even though I tried. It was a setback, but I'm trying to stay positive.
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Cute turtles! Bummer about the setback. Any positive vibes comin' your way? I just revised on of my old recipes and made this!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, yeah it's a bummer that I didn't do well. But it's all part of the learning curve, you know? Also that looks super good! Anyways, how are you holding up?
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: I'm doing OK, thanks. Just been tinkering with that recipe and a few others. It's helping me find some comfort and getting creative.
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: What else are you making? It's always satisfying to see the kind of things you do when your in one of those moods!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Been tweaking a dessert recipe to make it yummier and more accessible.
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Wow, that sounds great! What flavors are you experimenting with?
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Trying out different flavors like chocolate, raspberry, and coconut has been a blast!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Sounds delicious! Are you only trying dairy-free options?
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Yeah, since I'm lactose intolerant I'm trying out dairy-free options like coconut or almond milk instead. It's been a fun challenge seeing how to make yummy treats that suit everyone's diets. I even made these dairy-free chocolate coconut cupcakes with raspberry frosting.
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Woah, those look great, Joanna! It's cool that you make desserts that work for everyone's diets. Do you have any more yummy recipes hiding in there?
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Yep! I've been making all sorts of desserts that work for everyone's diets - cookies, pies, cakes - everything! I'll share more recipes with you soon.
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Can't wait to try them. Can I join you sometime? I think baking and cooking really brings us together!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Yeah, Nate! A fellow Chef in the kitchen is always a great help! Speaking of which, i'm curious, any more tips for dairy-free baking?
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: You can use stuff like dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter, and make sure to check the labels to ensure they're dairy-free. Good luck!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Love your ideas, can't wait to try them out!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: No problem! I love to help, so just shoot me a question anytime you need!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Joanna: Got it Nate, I'll see you soon!
6:03 pm on 5 September, 2022 Nate: Bye Joanna! Good luck!

features.content_text:
Session window: 1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 -> 1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, long time no see! My laptop crashed last week and I lost all my work - super frustrating! As a writer, my laptop is like half of my lifeline so losing all progress was like a major blow.
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, sorry to hear about that. Losing so much progress must be really frustrating. Did you manage to recover anything? Maybe consider backing up your work in the future?
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's laptop crash and lost work laptop, work, writer, progress, backup

events.description: My laptop crashed last week
I lost all my work last week

features.content_text:
Session window: 1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 -> 1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Thanks for the sympathy, Nate. Nothing was recoverable, but now I have an external drive for backups. I never want to go through this again. So, how have you been? Making anything cool?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, I'm no writer like you, but something pretty awesome happened. Last Monday I got to teach people vegan ice cream recipes on my own cooking show! It was a bit nerve-wracking to put myself out there, but it was a blast. Plus, I picked up a few new recipes!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Way to go, Nate! Congrats on the cooking show, I'll definitely be tuning in! What's your favorite dish from the show?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Coconut milk ice cream is at the top of my list. It's so smooth and creamy with a tropical coconut twist. Plus, it's dairy-free for people who can't have lactose or who want vegan options. Here's a snap of the ice cream I made.
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Wow, that looks amazing, Nate! I love the color and texture. It's great that you're making these options. Could you share the recipe? I'd love to try making it sometime!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Yeah sure! Would love to share it. Let's spread the joy of dairy-free options! Let me know when you make it!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Cool, Nate! Gonna give it a go. Dairy-free is a must for me, especially for desserts. Last Friday, I made a deeeelish dessert with almond milk - it was good! Got any favs when it comes to dairy-free desserts?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Coconut milk ice cream is one of my favorites as you might be able to tell, but I also love a dairy-free chocolate mousse. It's super creamy and tastes like the real thing. What's been your favorite dairy-free sweet treat so far?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, my favorite dairy-free treat is this amazing chocolate raspberry tart. It has an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries - it's delicious!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: That looks amazing, Joanna! I need to try baking that. What other treats do you like making?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, I love making this dairy-free chocolate cake with raspberries. It's so moist and delicious - perfect sweetness level.
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: That cake looks amazing, Joanna! How did you make it?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: I make it with almond flour, coconut oil, chocolate and raspberries. It's my favorite for birthdays and special days.
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Yum, Joanna! Gotta try that one. Any others you want to share?
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Here's another recipe I like. It's a delicious dessert made with blueberries, coconut milk, and a gluten-free crust. So creamy and delicious!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Wow, Joanna! That dessert looks amazing. I'll definitely have to give it a try. Thanks!
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Joanna: Glad to help, Nate. Let me know if you try it. I'm sure you'll enjoy it. It was great chatting.
1:43 pm on 14 September, 2022 Nate: Thanks Joanna! I will. Bye!

features.content_text:
Session window: 11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 -> 11:15 am on 6 October, 2022
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate, hi! Yesterday, I tried my newest dairy-free recipe and it was a winner with my family! Mixing and matching flavors is fun and I'm always trying new things. How about you?
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! That tart looks yummy! Lately, I've been doing great - I won a really big video game tournament last week and it was awesome! I still can't believe I made so much money from it.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Way to go, Nate! Winning the tournament and earning cash is awesome - congrats! Did you save it for something special?
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: Thanks Joanna! Yeah, I saved some but I'm not sure what to do with it - I'm completely content already. I don't have big plans anyway, so it's nice to have the extra cash on hand.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: That's awesome, Nate! Having some extra cash on hand definitely brings a sense of freedom and relaxation, huh?
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: Yes! Finally, I don't have to stress about it, so I can just enjoy my movies and games.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Taking breaks and reducing stress is pretty nice! Have you watched any good movies recently? I could use some recommendations!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: I watched "Little Women" recently, and it was great! The acting was awesome and the story was so captivating. Definitely a good one!

features.content_text:
Session window: 11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 -> 11:15 am on 6 October, 2022
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: I'm so glad you enjoyed it! I recommended it to you a while back. I watched it too and it really spoke to me. Themes like sisterhood, love, and chasing dreams were explored so well. By the way, I finished up my writing for my book last week. Put in a ton of late nights and edits but finally got it done. I'm so proud of it! Can't wait to see what happens next.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: Way to go! We both know it took some effort, but I'm sure it'll be great. Congrats on finishing it up!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! Your words mean a lot. Dedication and late nights got me here, but it was worth it. Just like you with your recent tournament - hard work pays off. I appreciate your support throughout!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: I'm always here for you, Joanna! You've worked so hard and accomplished a lot – I'm proud. Keep on going!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! I won't give up on my goals as long as your here to support me.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: You can always count on me! I even made this for you!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Wow, Nate, that looks awesome! What inspired you?
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: I figured you could always look back on this whenever you need encouragement, and that was all the inspiration I needed. And I would also say that your life path can be quite inspirational!
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Wow, Nate! That's sweet of you! I'll make sure to remember this when I need the encouragement the most.
11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Nate: Awesome! I know encouragement is what got me so far in my gameing career, so I figured why not share the love.

11:15 am on 6 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! I absolutley love DIYs, and I know she does too.

features.content_text:
Session window: 10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 -> 10:58 am on 9 October, 2022
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, it's been a couple days since we last talked. Something exciting happened last Friday. I went to a game convention and met new people who weren't from my normal circle. It was a bit overwhelming but it reminded me of the good times gaming can bring.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Good to hear from you. Sounds like fun! Meeting new people can be overwhelming, but the rewards can be great. Sometimes it's good to step outside our comfort zones and explore new things.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Yeah, you're right! We can have great experiences if we take risks. I even made some friends at the convention who love games just like me. We already planned a gaming session together - it's cool to meet people who have the same interests!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: That looks awesome! I'm glad you met people who share your interests - that definitely makes experiences more fun..
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: I also met some people who also played this boardgame I love, so I joined in. We had a lot in common and hit it off. It's great when shared hobbies can bond people!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: It's incredible how a game can bring people together and form strong relationships. Did you do anything else there?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: We played this game Catan - it's a great strategy game where you build settlements and trade resources. I love it!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Looks cool! Is it more of a competitive game or a more chill one?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: It can be both competitive and chill. We were competing, but still had lots of fun.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Competitive games can definitely be difficult to play sometimes when people get all upset about every move you make, but it's cool they were all chill! Glad you had a good time.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: It was great! Playing games is my escape from life struggles, so I generally don't get crazy competitive over them. The people at the convention were the same way!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Glad you found a way to have fun and escape! It's important to stay happy and de-stress. Keep doing what makes you happy!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: For sure! You should go to a writing convention or something sometime! The experience at this convention is unforgetable.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Do writing conventions exist? I'll have to look into that, it could be fun! Thanks for the idea. Have you been up to anything tonight?

10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: That sounds great! What's your favorite game or movie that you've seen recently?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: I recently saw a movie that blew my mind with all the twists and dream stuff, I think it was called "Inception". I've also been playing a game nonstop with a great futuristic setting and gameplay called "Cyberpunk 2077". Have you seen or played anything good lately?

10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: I watched a classic movie the other day that was awesome - the story was so gripping and the actors were great! It really stuck with me.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Wow, that must have been awesome! What would you rate it?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Well, it was amazing, so probably 9 or 10 out of 10! Movies can take us to different places and make us feel lots of emotions. What do you love about watching them?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Well they take me to new worlds and fill me with emotions. Plus, they're great for chilling out after a day.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: I agree! They have the power to take us away and make us feel things not normally experienced in life. It's a great escape! Especially when you have a room like this!

Session window: 10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 -> 10:58 am on 9 October, 2022
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Wow, it's so comfy in there! I should really get a set up like that.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: You should! It's one thing to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, I feel so at peace!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Any pointers on what I should get for my living room to make it comfy like that?
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: Sure! For one, you should get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure its really fluffy! Also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed.
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Nate: Sounds like you really got into making your living room! Thanks, I'll try that out for myself!
10:58 am on 9 October, 2022 Joanna: No problem! I get super invested in random little things like that, but I think its all worth it when I end up with random little things that make life so much nicer.

Session window: 2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 -> 2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna! That's cool. I've been getting so stressed lately because of my tournament progress - tough competitors - but my turtles always cheer me up.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Pets have a way of brightening our days. I still have that stuffed animal dog you gave me! I named her Tilly, and she's always with me while I write.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: Glad to hear it! What made you name her Tilly?
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: I used to have a dog back in Michigan with that name, but then I got allergic and we had to get rid of her. The name helps me remember her back when I used to be able to hold and squeeze animal without an allergic reaction!
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: That's so touching! Glad the stuffed animal means so much!
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Tilly helps me stay focused and brings me so much joy. It's amazing how even stuffed animals can do that!

features.content_text:

2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Same here! So have you been up to anything recenly?

features.content_text:
Session window: 2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 -> 2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: Yeah, I've just been practicing for my next video game tournemant. How about you?
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Well, I had a bit of a setback recently - another rejection from a production company.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: Bummer, Joanna. Is this the one you sent to a film contest? Rejections suck, but don't forget they don't define you. Keep at it and you'll find the perfect opportunity.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Yeah.. Thanks, Nate. It's hard, but I won't let it slow me down. I'm gonna keep grinding and moving ahead.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: That's what I like to hear! I really respect you for that and being able to bounce back whenever something sad happens!
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot. I'm gonna keep pushing forward and believing in myself.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: You got this, and don't ever forget that you have people cheering you on from the sidelines wherever you go.
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks! I'll see you around!
2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022 Nate: No problem! Catch you later!
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's challenges and resilience in the face of rejection video game tournament, setback, rejection, production company, film contest, opportunity, encouragement

events.description: Joanna had a bit of a setback - another rejection from a production company.

features.content_text:
Session window: 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 -> 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Hey Joanna, what's been up since we last chatted? How's it going?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Hey Nate! Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time! It was such a surreal experience to see everything come together. I felt a mix of emotions, but overall, it was a satisfying moment. I've been waiting for this for a long time!
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's movie script premiere experience movie script, big screen, experience, emotions, satisfying moment

events.description: Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen for the first time.

features.content_text:
Session window: 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 -> 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Congrats Joanna! How was it to finally see it on the big screen?

[shares a photo holding a videogame controller]
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome!
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Wow Joanna, those drawings are really incredible! What inspired you to create them?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! They're visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in my head so I can write better.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Wow Joanna, that's so cool! It's amazing how our imaginations can bring ideas to life. Can you tell me more about the character on the left in the photo?
features.topic_kw_text: Joanna's experience with her characters on the big screen Joanna, characters, dialogue, experience, writing, visuals, imagination

events.description: Joanna saw her characters and dialogue acted out on the big screen.
This is the third time it's happened.

features.content_text:
Session window: 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 -> 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Nope! You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself!
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: You got it. I was already planning on watching it, but talking to you about it makes me want to watch it even more!

features.content_text:
Session window: 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 -> 8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: I was bored today, so I just took my turtles out for a walk.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Sound fun! Did they have a good time?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Of course! They look tired from all the walking, so they're relaxing in the tank right now.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Aww, they're so cute! What do they eat?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: They eat a combination of vegetables, fruits, and insects. They have a varied diet.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Wow, that's fascinating! It's interesting how they have such a varied diet, including insects. Do you have a favorite among their food choices?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: I love seeing them eat fruit - they get so hyped and it's so cute!
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Wow, that's so cute! They look like they really enjoy fruit.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Yeah, it's adorable! Watching them enjoy their favorite snacks is so fun. I also like holding them.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: Do they have different personalities, like the way dogs and cats do?
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: Yeah, they each do. One is more adventurous while the other is more reserved, which I find cute. Having them around brings me joy and they make great companions.
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: That's super cool! I never knew turtles could be so interesting until I met your turtles. Wow!
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Nate: I've always liked turtles since I was a boy, so I know all about them!
8:16 pm on 25 October, 2022 Joanna: You'll have to keep me posted on them! It's been fun chatting!

features.content_text:
Session window: 3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 -> 3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Joanna: Wow, Nate, I'm on fire! I just set up meetings with movie producers — my dreams are comin' true!
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Nate: Wow Joanna, nice work! How did it go with those producer meetings?
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! The meetings went really well. I felt confident discussing my script and vision and they seemed interested and excited. They loved the elements of self-discovery in it. It was so validating to be taken seriously. I'm feeling hopeful and inspired about the future!
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Nate: Way to go, Joanna! Putting yourself out there is really brave and winning recognition for your hard work feels great. It's just like when I win a video game tournament - it feels awesome! I'm so proud of you and so glad you're feeling hopeful and inspired.
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot. Writing isn't always easy but moments like these make me appreciate it. I'm so thankful for all the opportunities. Last week, I found these old notebooks with my early writings - it was cool to see how far I've come.
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Nate: That's cool! You must love seeing how you've grown as an artist. Is there a favorite piece from your early writings that stands out to you?
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Joanna: Yup, I still remember this story from when I was 10. It was about a brave little turtle who was scared but explored the world anyway. Maybe even back then, I was inspired by stories about finding courage and taking risks. It's still a part of my writing today.
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Nate: You obviously have a passion for writing, and it's funny the story was about a turtle! Their resilience is so inspiring! Take courage and keep pushing yourself with your writing. Great job!
3:56 pm on 4 November, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! They make me think of strength and perseverance. They help motivate me in tough times - glad you find that inspiring!

8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: I am writing another movie script! It's a love story with lots of challenges. I've put lots of hard work into it and I'm hoping to get it on the big screen.
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Nate: Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?

8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: Thanks Nate! Writing has always been a passion of mine. I got the idea for this script from a dream. How have your turtles been? I haven't seen pictures of them in a while!
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Nate: Great actually! These little guys sure bring joy to my life! Watching them is so calming and fascinating. I've really grown fond of them. So, what about you, Joanna? What brings you happiness?
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: Creating stories and watching them come alive gives me happiness and fulfillment. Writing has been such a blessing for me.
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Nate: Well with dedication like yours, its no wonder you do so well in it as well! Are you planning on submitting anymore scripts anytime soon?
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: Yep! I actually just submitted a few more last week! Hoping to hear back from them soon, though I assume a few will be rejected.
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Nate: Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!
8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate the encouragement. I won't give up, I promise! Got it covered!

8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022 Joanna: Yeah, it does! My brother wrote it - he used to make me these cute notes when we were kids. Brings back sweet memories.
